name: BorgWarner Inc.
description: BorgWarner Inc. is a global product leader in clean and efficient technology solutions for combustion, hybrid, and electric vehicles. The company manufactures and sells propulsion system solutions, including turbochargers, e-boosters, e-turbos, timing systems, emissions systems, thermal management systems, transmission components, and power electronics. BorgWarner operates manufacturing and technical facilities across Europe, the Americas, and Asia, serving major original equipment manufacturers (OEMs) worldwide.
